# TECH_DEBT_REGISTRY.md
# Project-layer file -- fill in for this specific service
# Generated by: aec init
# Last updated: {{INSTALL_DATE}}
#
# This file is read by:
#   - Code Gen Agent (A09) -- avoids touching high-risk areas
#   - Refactor Agent (A10) -- prioritises refactoring work
#   - Estimation Agent (A05) -- applies risk multipliers
#   - Legacy Explainer Agent (A11) -- context for risky modules
#   - Bug Triage Agent (A17) -- checks for debt-related bug causes
#
# Record known technical debt items. Focus on High and Medium severity.
# Low severity items (style, minor cleanup) are optional.
#
# Severity:
#   High   -- poses risk of outage, security issue, or significant rework
#   Medium -- degrades developer productivity or system reliability
#   Low    -- cleanup opportunity with no immediate risk
#
# Effort:
#   Trivial -- < 1 day
#   Small   -- 1-3 days
#   Medium  -- 1-2 sprints
#   Large   -- 3+ sprints
#
# Run: npx aec update   after editing this file.
